posts.author: cberman (Corey)
posts.cookedHtml:
I appreciate that the subitem name will now word wrap! I believe that was a recent change.
However, there is a bug that the displayed area is still like 1 line height tall. So a word-wrapped title spanning 2 lines is chopped off at the top and bottom, see the image below.

image434×502 20.8 KB
